name: Sirloin Citrus Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Romaine lettuce, torn into bite-size pieces
2 Oranges, peeled and separated into segments
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the Citrus Vinaigrette by thoroughly combining all ingredients. Makes about 1/3 cup.
2. Prepare the salad: Cut the beef into 1-inch strips; cut each strip in half.
3. Heat oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Stir-fry beef (1/2 at a time) for 1 to 2 minutes.
4. Remove with a slotted spoon and season with salt, if desired.
5. Toss lettuce, beef, and oranges in a large bowl.
6. Sprinkle with walnuts and drizzle with the Citrus Vinaigrette.
7. Garnish with strawberries, if desired. Serve immediately.
Serving suggestions: Sesame bread sticks.
